intro: Sort your finds down to fine gold with this 6-Inch Gold Panning Classifier Sieve 6-Piece Set, built with durable green frames and stainless mesh for prospecting, mineral sifting and gemstone recovery.
Inspect fine detail up close with the Universal Tool 4pc Aluminum Jewelers Eye Loupe Set, offering 2.5X, 5X, 7.5X and 10X magnification for jewelry, coins, gemstones and gold inspection.
Start prospecting right away with the ASR Outdoor Complete Gold Panning Kit, a 21-piece deluxe set that pairs a sluice box with classifier screens and gold pans for finding flakes and nuggets.
Repair scuba gear fast with the Gear Aid Iron Mend Fabric Maintenance Kit, a black wetsuit and drysuit patch kit sized 10 x 6 inches for reliable, long-lasting neoprene repairs.
Recover every speck of color with the ASR Outdoor 19pc Complete Fine Gold Recovery Kit, a full set of gold prospecting equipment for separating, collecting and storing fine gold.
Grind, carve and engrave with the Universal Tool 50pc Diamond Burr Bit Set, featuring multiple grit sizes that fit standard rotary tools for stone, glass, metal and jewelry work.
